title: Josfault
description: A texture pack made for the crystal pvp youtuber Joszuaa.
body:
# Josfault Crystal PvP Texture Pack
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xOKpoujG/c6ea42e0048be87888a65412d657e354f3a87ad0.png)

The Josfault Crystal PvP Texture Pack is a custom-made resource pack designed specifically for Crystal PvP, for Joszuaa. This pack aims to enhance your crystal pvp experience.

# Features

Unique Aesthetic: The pack is designed with Joszuaa's preferences in mind, giving it the pack its very own style.

Optimized Performance: The pack is very optimized for performance, ensuring smooth gameplay even on lower-end systems.
